words.exampleArabic: أَحَالَ الطَّبِيبُ الْمَرِيضَ إِلَى طَبِيبِ الْقَلْبِ لِإِجْرَاءِ فَحَصٍ شَامِلٍ.
words.exampleBs: Ljekar je uputio pacijenta kardiologu na sveobuhvatni pregled.
words.exampleEn: The doctor referred the patient to the cardiologist for a comprehensive examination.

words.exampleArabic: زَارَ طَبِيبَ الْجِلْدِيَّةِ بِسَبَبِ طَفَحٍ جِلْدِيٍّ مُسْتَمِرٍّ.
words.exampleBs: Posjetio je dermatologa zbog trajnog kožnog osipa.
words.exampleEn: He visited the dermatologist due to a persistent skin rash.

words.exampleArabic: تَأْخُذُ الْأُمُّ طِفْلَهَا إِلَى طَبِيبِ الأَطْفَالِ لِفَحَصَاتِ النُّمُوِّ الدَّوْرِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Majka vodi dijete pedijatru na redovne preglede rasta i razvoja.
words.exampleEn: The mother takes her child to the pediatrician for regular growth checkups.

words.exampleArabic: أَجْرَى الْجَرَّاحُ عَمَلِيَّةً نَاجِحَةً دَامَتْ أَرْبَعَ سَاعَاتٍ.
words.exampleBs: Hirurg je proveo uspješnu operaciju koja je trajala četiri sata.
words.exampleEn: The surgeon performed a successful operation that lasted four hours.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَالِجُ الطَّبِيبُ النَّفْسَانِيُّ الاِضْطِرَابَاتِ النَّفْسِيَّةَ بِالدَّوَاءِ وَالْعِلَاجِ.
words.exampleBs: Psihijatar liječi psihičke poremećaje lijekovima i terapijom.
words.exampleEn: The psychiatrist treats mental disorders with medication and therapy.

words.exampleArabic: أُجْرِيَتِ الْعَمَلِيَّةُ الْجِرَاحِيَّةُ بِنَجَاحٍ وَتَعَافَى الْمَرِيضُ سَرِيعًا.
words.exampleBs: Hirurška operacija je obavljena uspješno i pacijent se brzo oporavio.
words.exampleEn: The surgical operation was carried out successfully and the patient recovered quickly.

words.exampleArabic: خَافَ الطِّفْلُ مِنَ الْحَقْنَةِ وَبَكَى عِنْدَ الطَّبِيبِ.
words.exampleBs: Dijete se bojalo injekcije i plakalo kod ljekara.
words.exampleEn: The child was afraid of the injection and cried at the doctor's.

words.exampleArabic: طَلَبَ الطَّبِيبُ تَحْلِيلَ الدَّمِ لِلتَّحَقُّقِ مِنْ مُسْتَوَى السُّكَّرِ.
words.exampleBs: Ljekar je zatražio analizu krvi kako bi provjerio nivo šećera.
words.exampleEn: The doctor requested a blood test to check the sugar level.

words.exampleArabic: أَظْهَرَ التَّصْوِيرُ الإِشِعَاعِيُّ كَسْرًا فِي الْمِعْصَمِ.
words.exampleBs: Rendgenski snimak je pokazao prelom zgloba.
words.exampleEn: The X-ray revealed a fracture in the wrist.

words.exampleArabic: يَعْتَمِدُ التَّشْخِيصُ الدَّقِيقُ عَلَى نَتَائِجِ الْفَحُوصَاتِ الْمُخْتَلِفَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Precizna dijagnoza ovisi o rezultatima različitih pregleda.
words.exampleEn: Accurate diagnosis depends on the results of various tests.

words.exampleArabic: لَا تَسْتَطِيعُ شِرَاءَ هَذَا الدَّوَاءِ بِدُونِ وَصْفَةٍ طِبِّيَّةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Ne možeš kupiti ovaj lijek bez ljekničkog recepta.
words.exampleEn: You cannot buy this medicine without a prescription.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ السُّكَّرِيُّ الِالْتِزَامَ بِنِظَامٍ غِذَائِيٍّ صَارِمٍ.
words.exampleBs: Dijabetes zahtijeva pridržavanje stroge prehrane.
words.exampleEn: Diabetes requires adherence to a strict diet.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَدُّ ضَغْطُ الدَّمِ الْمُرْتَفِعُ مِنْ عَوَامِلِ خَطَرِ أَمْرَاضِ الْقَلْبِ.
words.exampleBs: Visoki krvni pritisak smatra se faktorom rizika za bolesti srca.
words.exampleEn: High blood pressure is considered a risk factor for heart diseases.

words.exampleArabic: سَبَّبَ الإِلْتِهَابُ تَوَرُّمًا وَأَلَمًا شَدِيدَيْنِ فِي الْمَنْطِقَةِ الْمُصَابَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Upala je uzrokovala jako oticanje i bol u zahvaćenom području.
words.exampleEn: The inflammation caused severe swelling and pain in the affected area.

words.exampleArabic: تَكَشَّفَ عَنْ كَسْرٍ فِي الْقَدَمِ بَعْدَ فَحَصِ الأَشِعَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Rendgenski pregled otkrio je prelom stopala.
words.exampleEn: A fracture in the foot was revealed after the X-ray examination.

words.exampleArabic: تُعَانِي مِنْ حَسَاسِيَّةٍ تِجَاهَ حَبِّ اللَّقَاحِ فِي فَصْلِ الرَّبِيعِ.
words.exampleBs: Pati od alergije na pelud tokom proljeća.
words.exampleEn: She suffers from an allergy to pollen in spring.

words.exampleArabic: انْتَشَرَتِ الْعَدْوَى بَيْنَ الطُّلَّابِ فِي الْفَصْلِ الدِّرَاسِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Infekcija se proširila među učenicima u razredu.
words.exampleEn: The infection spread among students in the classroom.

words.exampleArabic: بَاتَ الِاهْتِمَامُ بِالصِّحَّةِ النَّفْسِيَّةِ أَمْرًا ضَرُورِيًّا فِي الْمُجْتَمَعِ الْحَدِيثِ.
words.exampleBs: Briga o mentalnom zdravlju postala je neophodna u savremenom društvu.
words.exampleEn: Caring for mental health has become essential in modern society.

words.exampleArabic: تَعَلَّمَ تَقْنِيَاتِ إِدَارَةِ الضَّغْطِ لِتَحْسِينِ جَوْدَةِ حَيَاتِهِ.
words.exampleBs: Naučio je tehnike upravljanja stresom kako bi poboljšao kvalitetu svog života.
words.exampleEn: He learned stress management techniques to improve his quality of life.

words.exampleArabic: يُمَارِسُ التَّأَمُّلَ يَوْمِيًّا لِتَهْدِئَةِ الذِّهْنِ وَتَخْفِيفِ التَّوَتُّرِ.
words.exampleBs: Svakodnevno praktikuje meditaciju radi smirenja uma i smanjenja tenzije.
words.exampleEn: He practices meditation daily to calm the mind and reduce tension.

words.exampleArabic: وَضَعَ الطَّبِيبُ خَطَّةً غِذَائِيَّةً مُنَاسِبَةً لِحَالَةِ الْمَرِيضِ.
words.exampleBs: Ljekar je sastavio odgovarajući plan prehrane za pacijentovo stanje.
words.exampleEn: The doctor drew up a nutrition plan suitable for the patient's condition.

words.exampleArabic: احْتَاجَ اللَّاعِبُ إِلَى أَشْهُرٍ مِنْ إِعَادَةِ التَّأْهِيلِ بَعْدَ إِصَابَتِهِ.
words.exampleBs: Igraču je trebalo nekoliko mjeseci rehabilitacije nakon povrede.
words.exampleEn: The player needed months of rehabilitation after his injury.

words.exampleArabic: لَا يَنْبَغِي تَنَاوُلُ الْمُضَادَّاتِ الْحَيَوِيَّةِ دُونَ وَصْفَةٍ طِبِّيَّةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Antibiotike ne treba uzimati bez ljekničkog recepta.
words.exampleEn: Antibiotics should not be taken without a medical prescription.

words.exampleArabic: تَنَاوَلَ مُسَكِّنَ الأَلَمِ بَعْدَ الْعَمَلِيَّةِ لِتَخْفِيفِ الأَلَمِ.
words.exampleBs: Nakon operacije uzeo je analgetik za ublažavanje boli.
words.exampleEn: He took a painkiller after the operation to relieve pain.

words.exampleArabic: يَجِبُ الِالْتِزَامُ بِالْجُرْعَةِ الْمُقَرَّرَةِ مِنَ الدَّوَاءِ.
words.exampleBs: Treba se pridržavati propisane doze lijeka.
words.exampleEn: The prescribed dosage of the medicine must be adhered to.

words.exampleArabic: اقْرَأِ النَّشْرَةَ الدَّاخِلِيَّةَ لِمَعْرِفَةِ الأَعْرَاضِ الْجَانِبِيَّةِ قَبْلَ تَنَاوُلِ الدَّوَاءِ.
words.exampleBs: Pročitaj uputstvo za upotrebu kako bi saznao nuspojave prije uzimanja lijeka.
words.exampleEn: Read the package leaflet to learn about side effects before taking the medicine.

words.exampleArabic: تَحَقَّقَ دَائِمًا مِنْ تَارِيخِ انْتِهَاءِ الصَّلَاحِيَّةِ قَبْلَ اسْتِخْدَامِ أَيِّ دَوَاءٍ.
words.exampleBs: Uvijek provjeri datum isteka roka trajanja prije upotrebe bilo kojeg lijeka.
words.exampleEn: Always check the expiry date before using any medicine.

words.exampleArabic: نُقِلَ إِلَى غُرْفَةِ الطَّوَارِئِ بَعْدَ تَعَرُّضِهِ لِحَادِثَةٍ مُرُورِيَّةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Prebačen je na hitnu pomoć nakon što je doživio saobraćajnu nesreću.
words.exampleEn: He was taken to the emergency room after being involved in a traffic accident.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَالَجُ كَمَرِيضٍ خَارِجِيٍّ وَلَا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى الإِقَامَةِ فِي الْمُسْتَشْفَى.
words.exampleBs: Liječi se kao ambulantni pacijent i nije mu potrebno bolničko liječenje.
words.exampleEn: He is treated as an outpatient and does not need hospital admission.

words.exampleArabic: حَجَزَتْ مَوْعِدًا طِبِّيًّا لِأَسْبُوعِ الْقَادِمِ.
words.exampleBs: Zakazala je ljeknički termin za sljedeću sedmicu.
words.exampleEn: She booked a medical appointment for next week.

words.exampleArabic: يُغَطِّي التَّأْمِينُ الصِّحِّيُّ مَعْظَمَ تَكَالِيفِ الْعِلَاجِ وَالأَدْوِيَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Zdravstveno osiguranje pokriva većinu troškova liječenja i lijekova.
words.exampleEn: Health insurance covers most treatment and medication costs.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْتَفِظُ الطَّبِيبُ بِسِجِلٍّ طِبِّيٍّ شَامِلٍ لِكُلِّ مَرِيضٍ.
words.exampleBs: Ljekar vodi sveobuhvatnu medicinsku dokumentaciju za svakog pacijenta.
words.exampleEn: The doctor maintains a comprehensive medical record for each patient.

words.exampleArabic: أُدْخِلَ الْمُسْتَشْفَى عَلَى وَجَهِ السُّرْعَةِ بَعْدَ تَدَهْوُرِ حَالَتِهِ.
words.exampleBs: Hitno je primljen u bolnicu nakon pogoršanja stanja.
words.exampleEn: He was urgently admitted to the hospital after his condition deteriorated.

words.exampleArabic: اشْتَرَى الدَّوَاءَ مِنَ الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ الْقَرِيبَةِ مِنْ مَنْزِلِهِ.
words.exampleBs: Lijek je kupio u apoteci u blizini kuće.
words.exampleEn: He bought the medicine from the pharmacy near his home.

words.exampleArabic: نَصَحَ الصَّيْدَلَانِيُّ بِضَرُورَةِ تَنَاوُلِ الدَّوَاءِ مَعَ الطَّعَامِ.
words.exampleBs: Farmaceut je savjetovao da se lijek uzima s hranom.
words.exampleEn: The pharmacist advised taking the medicine with food.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ الْمَرَضُ الْمُزْمِنُ رِعَايَةً طِبِّيَّةً مُسْتَمِرَّةً.
words.exampleBs: Hronična bolest zahtijeva kontinuiranu medicinsku njegu.
words.exampleEn: A chronic disease requires continuous medical care.

words.exampleArabic: الْوَقَايَةُ خَيْرٌ مِنَ الْعِلَاجِ، كَمَا يَقُولُ الْمَثَلُ.
words.exampleBs: Prevencija je bolja od liječenja, kako kaže poslovica.
words.exampleEn: Prevention is better than cure, as the saying goes.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْرِصُ الرِّيَاضِيُّ عَلَى الْحِفَاظِ عَلَى لِيَاقَتِهِ الْبَدَنِيَّةِ طَوَالَ الْعَامِ.
words.exampleBs: Sportaš vodi računa o održavanju fizičke kondicije tokom cijele godine.
words.exampleEn: The athlete is keen on maintaining physical fitness throughout the year.

words.exampleArabic: قَاسَ الطَّبِيبُ نَبْضَ الْمَرِيضِ وَوَجَدَهُ طَبِيعِيًّا.
words.exampleBs: Ljekar je izmjerio puls pacijenta i utvrdio da je normalan.
words.exampleEn: The doctor measured the patient's pulse and found it normal.

words.exampleArabic: قِيَاسُ ضَغْطِ الدَّمِ بِانْتِظَامٍ مُهِمٌّ لِمَرْضَى الْقَلْبِ.
words.exampleBs: Redovno mjerenje krvnog pritiska važno je za srčane pacijente.
words.exampleEn: Regular blood pressure measurement is important for heart patients.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَزِّزُ الغِذَاءُ الصَّحِّيُّ الْمَنَاعَةَ وَيُقَاوِمُ الأَمْرَاضَ.
words.exampleBs: Zdrava prehrana jača imunitet i pomaže u borbi protiv bolesti.
words.exampleEn: Healthy food enhances immunity and helps fight diseases.

words.exampleArabic: اللِّقَاحُ الأَكْثَرُ أَمَانًا مِنَ الإِصَابَةِ بِالْمَرَضِ.
words.exampleBs: Vakcina je sigurnija od obolijevanja od bolesti.
words.exampleEn: The vaccine is safer than contracting the disease.

words.exampleArabic: تَشْمَلُ أَعْرَاضُ الإِنْفِلُونْزَا الْحُمَّى وَالسُّعَالَ وَآلَامَ الْجِسْمِ.
words.exampleBs: Simptomi gripe uključuju groznicu, kašalj i bolove u tijelu.
words.exampleEn: Flu symptoms include fever, cough, and body aches.

words.exampleArabic: دَعَا أَصْدِقَاؤُهُ لَهُ بِالتَّعَافِي الْعَاجِلِ بَعْدَ الْعَمَلِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Prijatelji su mu željeli brzi oporavak nakon operacije.
words.exampleEn: His friends wished him a speedy recovery after the operation.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَّبِعُ حِمْيَةً خَاصَّةً لِخَفْضِ مُسْتَوَى الْكُولِسْتِيرُولِ.
words.exampleBs: Slijedi posebnu dijetu kako bi snizio nivo kolesterola.
words.exampleEn: He follows a special diet to lower cholesterol levels.

words.exampleArabic: تَخَصَّصَ فِي جِرَاحَةِ الْعِظَامِ بَعْدَ سَنَوَاتٍ مِنَ الدِّرَاسَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Specijalizovao se za ortopedsku hirurgiju nakon godina studiranja.
words.exampleEn: He specialized in bone surgery after years of study.

words.exampleArabic: يُنْصَحُ بِإِجْرَاءِ فَحْصٍ دَوْرِيٍّ كُلَّ سِتَّةِ أَشْهُرٍ.
words.exampleBs: Preporučuje se obavljanje redovnog pregleda svaka šest mjeseci.
words.exampleEn: It is recommended to have a periodic checkup every six months.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَالِجُ الطَّبِيبُ مَرْضَاهُ بِمَهَارَةٍ وَتَفَانٍ.
words.exampleBs: Ljekar liječi svoje pacijente s vještinom i predanošću.
words.exampleEn: The doctor treats his patients with skill and dedication.

words.exampleArabic: يَصْعُبُ أَحْيَانًا تَشْخِيصُ بَعْضِ الأَمْرَاضِ النَّادِرَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Ponekad je teško dijagnosticirati neke rijetke bolesti.
words.exampleEn: It is sometimes difficult to diagnose certain rare diseases.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَعَافَى الْمَرِيضُ تَدْرِيجِيًّا بَعْدَ الْخُضُوعِ لِلْعِلَاجِ الْكِيمِيَائِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Pacijent se postepeno oporavlja nakon hemioterapije.
words.exampleEn: The patient is gradually recovering after chemotherapy.

words.bs: žali se na, tuži se na
words.exampleArabic: يَشْكُو مِنْ آلَامٍ مُسْتَمِرَّةٍ فِي الظَّهْرِ مُنْذُ أُسْبُوعَيْنِ.
words.exampleBs: Žali se na stalnu bol u leđima već dvije sedmice.
words.exampleEn: He has been complaining of persistent back pain for two weeks.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَنَاوَلُ دَوَاءً لِضَغْطِ الدَّمِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
words.exampleBs: Svakodnevno uzima lijek za krvni pritisak.
words.exampleEn: He takes blood pressure medicine every day.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْجِزُ مَوْعِدًا مَعَ طَبِيبِهِ مَرَّةً كُلَّ ثَلَاثَةِ أَشْهُرٍ.
words.exampleBs: Zakazuje termin kod svog ljekara jednom u tri mjeseca.
words.exampleEn: He books an appointment with his doctor once every three months.

words.exampleArabic: أُرْسِلَتِ الْعَيِّنَاتُ إِلَى الْمُخْبَرِ لِتَحْلِيلِهَا.
words.exampleBs: Uzorci su poslani u laboratoriju na analizu.
words.exampleEn: The samples were sent to the laboratory for analysis.

words.exampleArabic: يُؤَثِّرُ الضَّغْطُ النَّفْسِيُّ سَلْبًا عَلَى الْجِهَازِ الْهَضْمِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Psihički stres negativno utječe na probavni sistem.
words.exampleEn: Psychological stress negatively affects the digestive system.

words.exampleArabic: النَّوْمُ الْكَافِي ضَرُورِيٌّ لِتَجْدِيدِ طَاقَةِ الجِسْمِ وَتَرْكِيزِ الذِّهْنِ.
words.exampleBs: Dovoljan san je neophodan za obnavljanje tjelesne energije i koncentracije.
words.exampleEn: Adequate sleep is essential for renewing body energy and mental focus.
